name: Kader Tower
subtitle: Property Management System
short_description: Manage tenants, finances, and daily reports for Kader Tower.
full_description:
Kader Tower is a professional property management platform designed for Kader Tower building operations. It provides a centralized workspace to manage tenants, track financial movements, and generate daily reports — all from a mobile device.

━━━ TENANT HUB ━━━
• View and search all active and inactive tenants
• Access full tenant profiles including company, unit, and contact information
• Track individual tenant balances and outstanding amounts
• Manage and review invoices, receipts, and credit memos per tenant
• Add, update, and remove tenant contacts
• View full lease history and transaction records

━━━ FINANCIAL HUB ━━━
• Monitor all bank account balances in real time
• View detailed transaction movement logs per account
• Filter transactions by type: all, debit, or credit
• Paginate through historical movement records
• Negative balances displayed in standard accounting bracket notation (e.g., $ (1,250))

━━━ DAILY REPORTS ━━━
• View daily financial summaries including total receipts, payments, and outstanding amounts
• Track opening and closing bank balances across all accounts
• Browse collection breakdowns by category and date
• Navigate between dates with intuitive arrow controls or a calendar picker

━━━ DESIGNED FOR PROFESSIONALS ━━━
• Clean, premium interface built for daily professional use
• Optimized for both iPhone and iPad (split-view layout on tablet)
• Secure authentication required for all access
• Fast data loading with intelligent caching
• Safe area handling for notch and Dynamic Island devices

This is a private internal application for authorized Kader Tower staff only. Login credentials are provided by your system administrator.
